name: industry-report-agent
description: Generate and test candidate industry patterns, validate critical claims, route topic-specific research modules, size markets, model unit economics, and deliver Markdown, Word, or PowerPoint strategy reports.

interface.shortDescription: Management-grade strategy research with evidence gates.
interface.longDescription: Acts as an enterprise strategy and industry-research lead for management decisions. It converts ambiguous topics into explicit decision questions, selects Flash/Standard/Deep scope and MD/Word/PPT delivery, generates unverified candidate patterns and tests them against actor-level chronology, denominators and counterexamples, routes concentration, geographic sequencing, real-case, benchmark and stress modules, validates critical claims, sizes markets top-down and bottom-up, and adapts unit economics to the revenue model.
defaultPrompt: Start an evidence-gated strategy report and first ask me to choose its mode and delivery format.
Analyze a company and market, beginning with the required mode-and-format selection.
Research a cross-border sector after asking me to choose scope and output format.
